proposed_relations.description: Third Community Advisory Committee meeting for the Webster Avenue SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Thursday September 27, 2012, 3:00-5:00pm Garden Terrace Room Foyer at Abigail Kirsch The New York Botanical Garden 2900 Southern Boulevard, Bronx, NY 10458

On Thursday, September 27, 2012, The New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT), held the third Community Advisory Committee (CAC) meeting for the Webster Avenue Select Bus Service (SBS) project at The New York Botanical Garden.

decisions.rationale: Event is the third CAC meeting for the Webster Avenue SBS project, explicitly named in the meeting summary source document.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On Thursday, September 27, 2012, The New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT), held the third Community Advisory Committee (CAC) meeting for the Webster Avenue Select Bus Service (SBS) project at The New York Botanical Garden.
